sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111698" key="flauro/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλαυρότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111698.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">poorness,</tr_> cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φαυλότης,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.962a</biblScope> </bibl>; condemned by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
